requirements.title: Registration rules (unique email/username, immutable username, no email verification)
Authentication: sign in, sign out, persistent login
Send friend requests by username and from room user list

bugs.description: The room members panel (RoomMembersPanel.tsx) does not expose an action to send a friend request from the user list in a chat room. Only username-based requests via the Contacts page are available, violating requirement 2.3.2's second bullet.

The Contacts UI labels the action 'Block' rather than 'Ban' as stated in requirements. Users may find the action but its effect on freezing existing DM history as read-only cannot be verified from UI labels alone and needs explicit indication.

requirements.title: Personal messaging only between friends with no mutual ban
Any registered user may create a chat room
Room properties (name, description, visibility, owner, admins, members, banned list); unique names
Private rooms not visible publicly; invite-only
Room ban rules (removed = banned, cannot rejoin)
Message content (text, multiline, emoji, attachments, reply); 3KB limit; UTF-8
Message deletion by author or admins

bugs.description: MessageItem.tsx only shows the delete (x) control when isMine is true. Room admins cannot delete other users' messages from the UI even though the requirement (and the backend API) allows it.

requirements.title: Persistent history, chronological order, infinite scroll, offline delivery
Send images and arbitrary file types
Preserve original file name; optional comment

bugs.description: Attachment comment in MessageComposer.tsx reuses the current text box content as the comment; there is no dedicated 'add a comment to the attachment' UI per requirement 2.6.3.

requirements.title: Access control: only members may download
Unread indicators on rooms and contacts

bugs.description: TopNav shows a global unread total next to 'Public Rooms' only, mixing DM and room unreads into one badge; wireframe and requirement expect separate unread indicators near individual room names and contact names. Individual room badges exist in the sidebar, but the Contacts list does not show per-contact unread badges.
No Jabber/XMPP protocol support found in BE or FE. No admin connection dashboard, no federation, no Jabber UI screens. This is the optional advanced requirement.

wireframes.screen_name: Landing / Sign in / Register / Forgot password
Main chat layout (top menu, sidebars, message area, composer)

bugs.description: Wireframe shows a unified rooms+contacts sidebar with an accordion that collapses when entering a room. The implementation has a right sidebar with Rooms and Direct Messages sections but lacks a Contacts section with presence dots, and there is no automatic compaction when a room is opened.

The sidebar has no combined 'Contacts' section with presence dots and unread badges as shown in the wireframe; contacts are only reachable via the Contacts page. Direct Messages list partially fills this role but omits general contacts the user has not DM-ed.
Sidebar in the wireframe includes a 'Create room' button at the bottom; implementation exposes room creation only via the Public Rooms page '+ New Room' button.
The wireframe shows a sidebar Search box for filtering rooms/contacts which is not present in RightSidebar.tsx.
Members tab does not include a 'Search member' input as shown in the wireframe.
Members table in the Manage Room dialog does not display per-member Status (online/AFK/offline) column; only role and username are shown. Wireframe expects Username/Status/Role/Actions columns.

all_bugs.description: Wireframe shows a unified rooms+contacts sidebar with an accordion that collapses when entering a room. The implementation has a right sidebar with Rooms and Direct Messages sections but lacks a Contacts section with presence dots, and there is no automatic compaction when a room is opened.
Members tab in Manage Room dialog does not include a 'Search member' input as shown in the wireframe.
Members table in the Manage Room dialog does not display per-member Status (online/AFK/offline) column; only role and username are shown. Wireframe expects Username/Status/Role/Actions columns.

The room members panel (RoomMembersPanel.tsx) does not expose an action to send a friend request from the user list in a chat room. Only username-based requests via the Contacts page are available, violating requirement 2.3.2's second bullet.
The Contacts UI labels the action 'Block' rather than 'Ban' as stated in requirements; UI does not clearly indicate that existing DM history becomes read-only/frozen after the ban.
MessageItem.tsx only shows the delete (x) control when isMine is true. Room admins cannot delete other users' messages from the UI even though the requirement (and the backend API) allows it.
TopNav shows a global unread total next to 'Public Rooms' only, mixing DM and room unreads into one badge; per-contact unread badges are missing in the Contacts list.
The sidebar has no combined 'Contacts' section with presence dots and unread badges as shown in the wireframe; contacts are only reachable via the Contacts page.
Attachment comment in MessageComposer.tsx reuses the current text box content as the comment; there is no dedicated 'add a comment to the attachment' UI per requirement 2.6.3.
No Jabber/XMPP protocol support found in BE or FE. No admin connection dashboard, no federation, no Jabber UI screens. This is the optional advanced requirement.
Sidebar in the wireframe includes a 'Create room' button at the bottom; implementation exposes room creation only via the Public Rooms page '+ New Room' button.
The wireframe shows a sidebar Search box for filtering rooms/contacts which is not present in RightSidebar.tsx.
